creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 196330
Poudriere bulk build log failure

I am building sysutils/apachetop in poudriere. It works in 10.4 jail, but failed in 11.2 jail:

log.cc:75:8: error: C-style cast from 'nullptr_t' to 'adns_queryflags' is not allowed
                            (adns_queryflags) NULL, NULL, b->dns_query);
                            ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
